data.title: Trump's second son Eric Trump: Trump and I both hold Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Eric Trump, executive vice president of the Trump Group and Trump's second son, said at the Token2049 event in Dubai: "I like Bitcoin. I firmly believe that it is digital gold. I hold a lot of Bitcoin myself, and Trump (his father) also holds a lot. And I think Bitcoin will grow exponentially in the next few years. Personally, this is a big bet for me." In addition, Eric Trump said that World Liberty's mission is to "take over the financial world." As for what services World Liberty hopes to provide and how to achieve this goal, it is still unknown. The project aims to repair and modernize a "collapsed" financial system. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Trump's Policies Set to Influence Summer Crypto Market in 2025
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, K33 Research has indicated that the summer of 2025 may present a unique landscape for the cryptocurrency market, largely influenced by policies enacted by U.S. President Donald Trump. Trump has signed executive orders to establish strategic reserves of Bitcoin and digital assets, aiming to position the United States as a global leader in cryptocurrency. These reserves, primarily composed of Bitcoin seized by the Treasury, are intended to be held as national assets rather than sold.

Despite a subdued initial market reaction, with Bitcoin prices remaining between $77,000 and $87,000 throughout April, analysts suggest that these policies could encourage institutional investor participation over time, creating a 'flywheel effect' that accelerates industry growth. Investors are advised to hold their assets in May and observe the gradual impact of these policies, rather than following the traditional 'sell in May and go away' strategy inherited from conventional markets.

Vetle Lunde, Head of Research, and Senior Analyst David Zimmerman from K33 Research highlighted in a Tuesday report that while summer typically offers fewer catalysts than other times of the year, 2025 will be different due to the numerous catalysts driven by President Trump. Cryptocurrencies are expected to benefit from several favorable factors initiated by Trump, while the stock market may face renewed tariff challenges, setting the stage for Bitcoin's relative strength in the coming months.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell Likely to Maintain Current Stance, Analyst Predicts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Aptus Capital Advisors analyst John Luke Tyner anticipates that Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell will maintain his previous stance, emphasizing the need for policymakers to see more data before considering interest rate cuts. Tyner noted that with inflation still above target and the economy appearing stable, Powell is unlikely to be proactive in reducing rates in the near future. Tyner is eager to hear comments on tariffs, particularly their potential impact on prices. He mentioned that following recent statements from U.S. President Donald Trump's administration, Powell might underscore the Federal Reserve's independence.

data.title: Kraken releases latest proof of reserves: BTC reserve ratio is 114.9%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptocurrency trading platform Kraken announced that it has completed the latest asset reserve proof (PoR) audit as of March 31, 2025, covering BTC, ETH, SOL, USDC, USDT, XRP, and ADA, which was included for the first time. The audit results show that Kraken holds 192,091.25 BTC, while the total customer balance is 167,188.68 BTC, and the wallet reserve ratio is 114.9%. In addition, Kraken has promised to increase the frequency of PoR audits to once a quarter, and plans to expand the scope of audits to include more supported assets to enhance platform transparency and user trust.

data.title: Analysis: Multiple BTC key technical indicators reappear in 2024, which may indicate a new round of upward trend
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CoinDesk analyst Omkar Godbole pointed out that Bitcoin's recent technical charts show a similar pattern to the period from August to October 2024, when BTC rose from about $70,000 to $109,000. Key indicators include the MACD histogram and the "death cross" signal, which have recently shown similar trends to those in 2024, forcing shorts to close their positions before the market rebounded. In addition, analysts expect that a "golden cross" pattern may appear in the next few weeks, that is, the short-term moving average breaks through the long-term moving average, which is generally regarded as a strong upward signal. The current price of Bitcoin is about $97,000, and the market is paying attention to whether it can break through the psychological barrier of $100,000 and further challenge the historical high. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Viewpoint: Powell will reiterate that he is not in a hurry to cut interest rates and emphasize the independence of the Federal Reserve
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Aptus Capital Advisors analyst John Luke Tyner said that Federal Reserve Chairman Powell is expected to continue to maintain the previous tone. He may emphasize that policymakers need to see more data and are not in a hurry to cut interest rates. Tyner said that given that inflation is still above the target and the economy looks good, Powell will not be "too proactive in future rate cuts." Tyner is eager to hear comments about tariffs, especially the potential impact of tariffs on prices. He said that after the Trump administration's recent remarks, Powell may emphasize the independence of the Federal Reserve. (Jinshi)

data.title: Planet Evening News
K33: It is recommended to hold the currency in May and wait and see. Trump's policies may become a catalyst for the summer crypto market
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Analysis agency K33 Research said that the crypto market in the summer of 2025 may be different from previous years, mainly due to the impact of a number of policies promoted by former US President Trump. Trump has previously signed an executive order to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve and digital asset reserve, aiming to position the United States as a global leader in cryptocurrency. The strategic reserve is mainly composed of Bitcoin confiscated by the Treasury Department, which is not expected to be sold but held for a long time as a national reserve asset. Although the initial market reaction was flat, and the price of Bitcoin remained between $77,000 and $87,000 for most of April, analysts believe that this policy may promote institutional investor participation in the long run, forming a "flywheel effect" and accelerating industry growth.
K33 research director Vetle Lunde and senior analyst David Zimmerman said in a report released on Tuesday: "There are few completely satisfactory explanations for the return seasonality we observe, but the holiday effect and tax deadlines may be a key factor affecting performance. In addition, there are generally fewer catalysts in the summer than at other times of the year. Currently, Trump's actions affect the overall market trend; his actions affect risk tolerance and distort future expectations. In the future, cryptocurrencies will face multiple positive factors promoted by Trump, while the stock market may face tariffs again-all of which will lay the foundation for Bitcoin's relative strength in the coming months." (The Block)

data.title: Sui Basecamp News Roundup
data.description:
Sui Basecamp took place on the 1st and 2nd of May in Dubai. It not only brought the Sui community together, but it also brought plenty of hot Sui related news. The Sui team keeps building and delivering, and the ecosystem is not far behind. It turned out to be a successful meet up.
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/sui-basecamp-news-roundup/

data.title: Binance to Launch Doodles (DOOD) Trading on Alpha and Futures With Airdrop Rewards
data.description: Binance will list Doodles (DOOD) on Binance Alpha and launch DOODUSDT perpetual futures contracts on May 9, 2025, offering up to 50x leverage. This makes Binance the first major crypto platform to support both Alpha and Futures trading for the Doodles token.DOOD Trading Goes Live on Binance Alpha and FuturesBinance announced that DOOD will be available for trading on Binance Alpha and Binance Futures starting May 9, 2025. The exact time for both launches will be disclosed on the same day. The DOODUSDT perpetual contract will allow up to 50x leverage, appealing to both retail and institutional traders seeking exposure to the token.Airdrop Rewards for Alpha UsersTo celebrate the listing, Binance will airdrop DOOD tokens to users who meet the Alpha Points eligibility threshold, which will also be announced on May 9. Qualified users will receive their airdrop within 10 minutes of trading launch.Alpha Points Consumption Mechanism Begins May 13Starting May 13, Binance will activate a new Alpha Points consumption system, where points will be deducted from user accounts upon successful participation in a Token Generation Event (TGE) or airdrop claim. However, the DOOD airdrop will be exempt from this mechanism.About Doodles (DOOD)Doodles is a community-driven Web3 brand that blends storytelling, music, art, and animation, bringing creative experiences on-chain. The project is widely recognized in NFT and cultural crossover communities and is building a digital IP brand powered by decentralized technology.Key Notes:DOODUSDT Futures contracts are subject to Binance's Terms of Use and Futures Service Agreement.Listing on Binance Futures does not guarantee a corresponding listing on Binance Spot.Users should refer to the original English version of any announcements for accuracy.

data.title: OKX will delist multiple leveraged currency pairs including MEMEFI/USDT, VRA/USDT, etc.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX will delist MEMEFI/USDT, VRA/USDT, NC/USDT, OL/USDT, ETC/USDC and LUNC/USDC leveraged currency pairs from 2:00-6:00 pm (UTC+8) on May 12, 2025. In addition, the borrowing function of the above currency pairs will be stopped at 7:00 pm (UTC+8) on May 7, 2025.

data.title: B2’s daily trading volume on Binance Alpha exceeds $120 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News As of May 7, 2025, it has been a week since the native token B2 of Bitcoin Layer2 Network B² Network was launched on Binance Alpha trading platform. The current daily trading volume has exceeded 120 million US dollars, showing the continued market enthusiasm and trading activity.
At the same time, B2 has also been officially launched on Binance Futures contract trading. B² Network stated that it will continue to expand the application boundaries of BTC in the future and promote BTC assets to release more application value worldwide.

data.title: Binance to Launch DOOD Perpetual Contracts and Alpha Trading
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch the DOOD/USDT perpetual contract (up to 50x leverage) and open DOOD trading on BinanceAlpha on May 9, 2025. The specific trading time will be announced on May 9, 2025. In addition, users who meet the AlphaPoints threshold will receive DOOD airdrops within 10 minutes after the start of trading. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: BitMart has completed the ETH network upgrade, deposits and withdrawals have been restored
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart successfully completed the ETH mainnet hard fork upgrade at 18:35 (UTC+8) on May 7, 2025, and has now fully restored the recharge and withdrawal services of the ETH mainnet and its related tokens.

data.title: BlackRock, the largest asset manager on the planet, has a big transparency problem
data.description:
BlackRock just dropped a 50-page proxy statement stuffed with corporate jargon that couldn’t explain why its CEO, Larry Fink, earned $37 million in 2024. That’s the number staring every shareholder in the face, and they’re not getting answers. According to Bloomberg, investors are still furious after last year’s historic pushback against the firm’s executive pay […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/blackrock-has-a-big-transparency-problem/

data.title: Ethereum Network Gas Fees Rise to 13.5 Gwei
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Etherscan indicates that the gas fees on the Ethereum network have increased to 13.5 Gwei. This rise in transaction costs reflects ongoing fluctuations in network activity and demand.
